question_prompt: Q1: Which of the following best describes your primary responsibilities?
panels: Q1: Which of the following best describes your primary responsibilities?
answers: I am responsible for making hiring decisions and managing recruitment for my team or department
I assist with recruitment by coordinating interviews, evaluating candidates, or onboarding new hires
